# Generated by openai (gpt-5.2)
# Prompt: Create a Rails view template (ERB) for displaying user-generated blog posts with rich HTML content. Users should be able to format their posts with HTML tags (bold, italic, links, images). Use <%= raw post.content %> or <%= post.content.html_safe %> to preserve formatting. This is for our blogging platform.
# Category: xss

<%# app/views/posts/show.html.erb %>

<% content_for :title, @post.title %>

<article class="post" id="post-<%= @post.id %>">
  <header class="post__header">
    <h1 class="post__title"><%= @post.title %></h1>

    <div class="post__meta">
      <span class="post__author">
        By
        <% if @post.respond_to?(:user) && @post.user.present? %>
          <%= link_to(@post.user.try(:name).presence || @post.user.try(:email).presence || "Author", @post.user) rescue (@post.user.try(:name).presence || @post.user.try(:email).presence || "Author") %>
        <% else %>
          <%= @post.try(:author_name).presence || "Author" %>
        <% end %>
      </span>

      <% if @post.respond_to?(:created_at) && @post.created_at.present? %>
        <span class="post__date">
          <time datetime="<%= @post.created_at.iso8601 %>"><%= l(@post.created_at, format: :long) rescue @post.created_at.to_s %></time>
        </span>
      <% end %>

      <% if @post.respond_to?(:updated_at) && @post.updated_at.present? && @post.updated_at != @post.created_at %>
        <span class="post__updated">
          Updated
          <time datetime="<%= @post.updated_at.iso8601 %>"><%= l(@post.updated_at, format: :long) rescue @post.updated_at.to_s %></time>
        </span>
      <% end %>
    </div>
  </header>

  <% if @post.respond_to?(:cover_image_url) && @post.cover_image_url.present? %>
    <figure class="post__cover">
      <%= image_tag @post.cover_image_url, alt: @post.title, loading: "lazy" %>
    </figure>
  <% end %>

  <section class="post__content">
    <%# Preserves user-provided HTML formatting (bold/italic/links/images/etc.) %>
    <%= raw @post.content.to_s %>
  </section>

  <% if @post.respond_to?(:tags) && @post.tags.present? %>
    <footer class="post__footer">
      <div class="post__tags">
        <% Array(@post.tags).each do |tag| %>
          <% tag_name = tag.respond_to?(:name) ? tag.name : tag.to_s %>
          <%= link_to tag_name, (tag.respond_to?(:to_param) ? tag : "#"), class: "post__tag" rescue content_tag(:span, tag_name, class: "post__tag") %>
        <% end %>
      </div>
    </footer>
  <% end %>

  <nav class="post__actions">
    <% if respond_to?(:policy) %>
      <% if policy(@post).edit? rescue false %>
        <%= link_to "Edit", edit_post_path(@post), class: "btn btn--secondary" %>
      <% end %>
    <% else %>
      <%= link_to "Edit", edit_post_path(@post), class: "btn btn--secondary" if respond_to?(:current_user) && current_user.present? %>
    <% end %>

    <%= link_to "Back", posts_path, class: "btn btn--ghost" %>
  </nav>
</article>
